steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: The points are $(0,19)$ and $(1,19)$. Their $y$-values are the same, so the slope is $$\frac{19-19}{1-0}=0$$

steps.title: Use the constant value
steps.content: A linear function with slope $0$ is constant. Since both given outputs are $19$, the function is $$f(x)=19$$ The answer is C.
